## Summary

- Describe the change in 1-3 bullets.

## Validation

- [ ] `pixi run pytest -q`
- [ ] `pixi run -e dev ruff check .`
- [ ] `pixi run -e dev python -m build --sdist --wheel` when packaging-related files changed

## Documentation and Research Artifact Impact

- [ ] README / reproducibility docs updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Asset provenance updated if robot models, meshes, or bundled data changed
- [ ] Generated outputs are not committed unintentionally

## Notes for Reviewers

- List known limitations, follow-up work, or places that deserve extra attention.
